code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result = ""
mut prev = ""
mut has_prev = false
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0

while i <= n
  mut is_end = false
  if i == n
    is_end = true
  end
  mut ch = ""
  if not is_end
    ch = string.substring(line, i, i + 1)
  end
  mut is_space = false
  if is_end
    is_space = true
  else if ch == " "
    is_space = true
  else if ch == "\t"
    is_space = true
  else if ch == "\r"
    is_space = true
  end
  if is_space
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      mut emit = false
      if not has_prev
        emit = true
      else if cur != prev
        emit = true
      end
      if emit
        if string.is_empty(result)
          result = cur
        else
          result = "#{result} #{cur}"
        end
        prev = cur
        has_prev = true
      end
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{ch}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
